justification: Boundaries correct (10 is heavy, 50 is freight). All 5 ACs covered with explicit AC-to-test mapping in acceptance_criteria_coverage. No external dependencies. No features beyond spec. Confidence level 99 >= 85. Additional boundary probes (9.99, 49.99, 1000, -1) go beyond minimum requirements without adding unrequested features.

observations.text: Boundary logic explicitly correct: weight < 10 makes 10 heavy, weight < 50 makes 50 freight
All 5 acceptance criteria mapped to specific test names
Extra boundary probes (9.99, 49.99, 1000, -1) strengthen coverage without gold-plating
No external dependencies, pure TypeScript function
Empty deviations and escalations arrays indicate faithful spec adherence
files_changed lists both implementation and test file with clear purpose
